name: Double Chocolate Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 oz White chocolate, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Butter an 8 or 9 inch square baking pan.
3. Line the pan with parchment paper or waxed paper.
4. Combine the melted chocolate and melted butter in a bowl.
5. In another bowl, beat eggs with sugar and vanilla extract until smooth.
6. Gradually add the egg mixture to the chocolate-butter mixture.
7. Stir together flour, baking powder, salt, chopped pecans, white chocolate, and semi-sweet chocolate in a separate bowl.
8. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake for 30 minutes. Brownies may appear underbaked but will set when cooled.
11. Allow brownies to cool completely at room temperature for half an hour.
12. Cut into squares.
13. Chill before serving.
